design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed derived from title + niche_landing + recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews + 2026-07-06T09:45:07Z → selected architecture workflow-command-center. AIDA Check: Hero (Attention), Proof + Workflow chapters (Interest), Field guide + media (Desire), CTA band (Action). Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk (primary), system sans fallback. Hero Math Verification: clamp headline ensures 2–3 lines at 1200px. Bento Density Verification: gapless bento grid with grid-auto-flow: dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: image-scale-fade-scroll + hover-physics guarded. Label Sweep & Button Check: primary black pill CTA, secondary white CTA, all links verified.
headline: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

site_brief.audience: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews AI assistant
recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page showing how Super helps recruiters run repeatable sourcing and interview‑coordination workflows with a personal AI agent that can actually operate recruiting tools and reuse a computer-use cache.
